heading: Reports of promotion boards: in general
label: 14109 Reports of promotion boards: in general
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in subsecs. (a) and (b) of this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 5897 of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1629(b)(2)
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1996section 1691(b)(1) of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title

children.heading: .—Report of Officers Recommended for Promotion
children.label: a .—Report of Officers Recommended for Promotion
children.text: Each promotion board convened under shall submit to the Secretary of the military department concerned a report in writing containing a list of the names of the officers recommended by the board for promotion. The report shall be signed by each member of the board.section 14101(a) of this title
that the board has carefully considered the record of each officer whose name was furnished to the board; and

that, in the case of a promotion board convened under , in the opinion of a majority of the members of the board, the officers recommended for promotion by the board are best qualified for promotion to meet the needs of the armed force concerned (as noted in the guidelines or information furnished the board under ) among those officers whose names were furnished to the selection board.section 14101(a) of this titlesection 14107 of this title

A promotion board convened under shall include in its report to the Secretary concerned the name of any reserve officer before it for consideration for promotion whose record, in the opinion of a majority of the members of the board, indicates that the officer should be required to show cause for retention in an active status.section 14101(a) of this title

If such a report names an officer as having a record which indicates that the officer should be required to show cause for retention, the Secretary concerned may provide for the review of the record of that officer as provided under regulations prescribed under .section 14902 of this title

children.heading: .—Report of Officers Recommended for Higher Placement on Promotion List
children.label: d .—Report of Officers Recommended for Higher Placement on Promotion List

children.text: the names of those officers the promotion board recommends be placed higher on the promotion list; and
the order in which the promotion board recommends those officers should be placed on the promotion list.
